name: Parade Companion — Islington
description: Offline map, group meet-up plan, safety info, and honest bus sightings for the Islington victory parade. Works with no signal. No account. Unofficial, fan-made.

stores: Your display name for local group signals
Your saved group plan and meetup notes
Your fan pulse taps and reports
Nearby fan signals imported by QR or public parade relay when a connection appears
Your local Banter votes and season debate picks
The latest validated route and live information pack
An anonymous app action queue for admin health analytics
data_passport.leaves_device: The offline fan core works without sending anything. When the phone has internet, anonymous fan pulse taps (presence, bus, toilet, crowd, road, food) may sync through Shippie's short-lived public parade relay with no login, name, or group plan. If you join a group, encrypted live join/location packets may pass through Shippie's short-lived SignalRoom relay so friends can see your dot; the room key is carried in the group invite. Public fan pulses are ignored after 22:00 BST on parade day and each tap expires sooner by type. Group live dots expire after 8 hours. Emergency/help taps stay local. Anonymous app action events may sync to Shippie admin when connected. Banter is local-only in v1.
data_passport.delete: Use Shippie's app data controls, or clear the plan, sightings, and fan pulse data inside the tool.
